title: satureja cordata subsp. filiformis
intro: Satureja cordata subsp. filiformis, also known as narrow-leaved savory, is a subspecies of perennial herb in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Satureja cordata subsp. filiformis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Satureja cordata subsp. filiformis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
